subject: [PATCH 13/13] selftests/mm: add PMD swap entry tests

2026-04-27.patch_summary: This patch adds tests for PMD-level swap entries in the Linux kernel. The tests cover various scenarios, including swapping out and in a THP (Transparent Huge Page), fork operations, write faults, munmap, mprotect, mremap, pagemap reading, MADV_FREE, UFFDIO_MOVE, and swapoff with active PMD swap entries. These tests aim to verify that the kernel correctly handles PMD-level swap entries and ensures data integrity in different scenarios.
